content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-6-max

## Summary

The implementation correctly removes the unsafe journal-reading fallback in persist_workflow_run_id and replaces it with an authoritative run_id captured directly from the dispatch/resume return value. The fix covers both single-repo and multi-repo daemon paths consistently. Key changes: (1) engine functions now return AppResult<String> (the run_id) via new *_and_capture_run_id variants, preserving backward compat with delegation wrappers; (2) persist_workflow_run_id takes an explicit Option<&str> instead of reading the journal; (3) try_reconcile_success receives the authoritative run_id and uses workflow_run_id_for_reconciliation to prefer it over the persisted task field; (4) missing_workflow_run_id_failure transitions the milestone controller to NeedsOperator and returns an error marking the task Failed. The RunStatus::Completed branch correctly returns Ok(None), and reconciliation retries with no authoritative or persisted run_id correctly fail closed. Three new tests cover the missing-binding, authoritative-binding-before-persistence, and persist-requires-authoritative scenarios. All acceptance criteria met: cargo test (788 passed), clippy -D warnings clean, fmt --check clean, nix build result symlink updated.

## Amendments

None.
